compiled_state.title: Reorganize tests along logical seams (6-12 files/dir, hard cap 24, subdirs)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Test organization is ad-hoc after the migration. Tests should be discoverable and easy to navigate, organized along logical seams, with manageable file and directory sizes.

## What
- Define the seam taxonomy (e.g. by subsystem: store/reducer/graph/commands/reads/reconciler/signing × interface tier) and map every existing test file to a home.
- Reorganize: each test file manageable in size; each directory 6–12 test files (HARD CAP 24); use subdirectories along seams so tests are discoverable.
- Preserve/repair conftest fixtures and test isolation through the move; ensure pytest discovery + markers still work.
- Verify the full suite runs green BOTH locally and in CI after reorg, with isolation maintained (no order-dependence, no shared-state leakage).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Seam taxonomy documented; every test file mapped to a seam-based location
- [ ] Each test directory holds 6–12 files (hard cap 24); subdirectories used along seams; files manageable in size
- [ ] Full suite green locally AND in CI post-reorg; markers + discovery intact
- [ ] Test isolation verified (e.g. pytest-randomly order-independence; no cross-test state leakage)

comments.body: DONE. Split tests/interfaces (41 files, over the 24 hard cap) via git mv into 5 seam subdirs: facades/(8), contracts/(6), lifecycle/(7), queries/(9), store/(11) — all within 6-12. conftest.py + adapters.py kept at interfaces root. Import safety: conftest sys.path-inserts its own dir so 'from adapters import' resolves from subdirs (6 sites); facades/test_cli_argparse.py uses _engine_path.repo_root() for golden path. Reviewer caught a real functional miss: [tool.mutmut] test-selection paths (+ docs) still pointed at old flat paths — repointed all 8 to new subdirs (a mutmut run would otherwise select zero tests for the cores); also fixed stale path refs in docs/{mutation-testing,exit-codes,event-schema,output-schemas,coverage,remediation-implementation-plan}.md. Verified: broad 1759 passed (same count, nothing un-collected) + integration 15; order-independent across pytest-randomly seeds 1234/9999 + no:randomly (identical 510); ruff clean; history preserved (git mv). Opus implementer + separate opus reviewer (APPROVE-WITH-NITS, all addressed). Commit 7a7a4393.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
